hook.summary: Quickly solving a simple sorting puzzle level.
hook.visual_action: Orange and blue characters are moved into their respective colored boxes on a grid.

scene_flow: Level 17: Quick demonstration of basic sorting mechanics with two colors.
Transition to Level 18: A significantly more complex grid with six different colors.
Fast-paced gameplay showing characters being moved to clear paths for others.
Continuous sorting action as the timer counts down, highlighting the challenge.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle gamers who enjoy satisfying organization and sorting challenges.
